headline: ₹200-500 Cr at risk over medium term due to potential cost of capital increases and valuation compression. — Adani Power's increased coal investment raises long-term ESG and regulatory risks amid global energy transition.
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], TCFD, CDP, GRI triggered; risk of SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
P/E compression risk (5-10%) as ESG ratings decline and investor appetite wanes.
Potential 20-40bps increase in cost of capital due to negative ESG perception and FII outflow.
